intent: Drive every testable source file to 100% coverage and keep the full suite green. Enforce a 100% jest coverageThreshold (after excluding genuinely-untestable dev scaffolds / secrets / real-API integration). Kermit-orchestrator agent dispatches test-writing work through Oscar (Telly writes, Zoe audits for vacuous tests) and LOOPS per-file until the 100% gate passes.
scope: jest.config.js (coverage gate + exclusions), package.json (test:coverage), tests-local/** (new + expanded tests for all weak files), minimal src/** istanbul-ignore justifications / dead-code removal only, tests-local/README.md

decisions.target: 100% statements/functions/lines; 100% branch where reachable, /* istanbul ignore */ with justification otherwise
decisions.skipped_tests: 8 real-Gemini integration stay excluded; 1 api-service rate-limit it.skip must be un-skipped + pass

progress.wave0: done (74284a3) — 100 gate set, rate-limit test un-skipped, flaky race fixed
